title: MCO Legals (Meharia and Company) is looking to hire Legal Associates in Mumbai
description: MCO Legals (Meharia and Company) invites applications for the Post of Legal Associate for its Mumbai office only.Essential Qualification and Experience:Position: Legal Associates - (2) Practicing Advocates enrolled with Bar Council of Maharashtra and Goa. Candidate must also hold experience of 2 to 3 years. Preference will be given to candidates from Maharashtra.Role & ResponsibilitiesThe candidate must have a flair for research, expertise in drafting, good communication skill
